_comment: Copy to seed.json (gitignored), edit, then run `node core/src/trust/seed.js`. The trust store is DEFAULT-DENY: only listed principals get access. Give the owner bypass_moderation (full trust). An `identifier` maps a (surface, value) to a principal — surface is the connector channel (discord, telegram, mcp, github, apikey); value is that channel's user id/username (for mcp, the `identity` username from connectors/types/mcp/clients.json). Grants without a role_id carry inline allow/forbidden lists; role_id references a role below.
